insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -13.1% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -11.1%, App Total Install -15.9%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-20 vs 07-13 = +1.1% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-13 vs 07-06 = +4.5% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCV surging (-13.5% vs upstream -52.2%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCV -13.5% vs upstream -52.2% (conversion surging); YCP -19.6% vs upstream -10.0% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: App split — App Total Install -15.9% concentrated in YCV — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total Install -15.9% is uneven by app (All App -15.9%, YMK -1.5%, YCP -8.5%, YCV -100.0%) — driven mainly by YCV, not a platform-wide shift.

insights.title: Country outlier — US is the outlier on App Total Install (-28.4% vs -15.9%).
insights.body: App Total Install · All App: US -28.4% vs all-country -15.9% (Δ -12.4pp; ≈36% of revenue).

insights.title: Data gap — 13 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 13 slice(s) n/a (missing data): YAT·CA·App Total New Subs, YAT·CA·App Total Revenue, YAT·ES·App Total New Subs, YAT·ES·App Total Revenue ….
